author.name: Emily Willow
author.penNameNote: KDP author name for SELKID chapter books and picture books.
author.bio: Chapter books and read-aloud stories for curious kids — SEL adventures, cozy mysteries, and Rex & Dino expeditions beyond the classroom.

series.title: Rex & Dino and the Magic Map Adventures
series.tagline: Survival, animal rescue, and big-world chapter adventures for ages 6–8.

books.title: Rainforest Rescue
books.subtitle: A Rainforest Adventure Chapter Book | Survival & Animal Rescue Story

series.title: Poppy's Everyday Adventures
series.tagline: Funny SEL chapter books about patience, problem-solving, and big feelings for ages 6–9.

books.title: Poppy and the Great Pancake Catastrophe
books.subtitle: Book 1 — patience, problem-solving, and big feelings

books.title: Poppy and the Shadow with Too Many Feelings
books.subtitle: Naming emotions, self-awareness, and coping with big feelings

books.title: Poppy and the Giant Library Mystery
books.subtitle: Thoughtful questions, teamwork, and the magic of slowing down

books.title: Poppy and the Big Decision Day
books.subtitle: Responsible choices, listening to every voice, and leading with kindness

books.title: Poppy and the Whispering Forest
books.subtitle: Patience, problem-solving, and big feelings in the forest

books.title: Poppy's Everyday Adventures: 5-in-1 Box Set
books.subtitle: Five stories for empathy, patience, and emotional growth

series.title: Dinosaur Academy: Everyday Adventures
series.tagline: School mysteries about friendship, honesty, and trust.

books.title: The Mystery of the Missing Lunchbox
books.subtitle: A school mystery about friendship, honesty & trust

series.title: Benny's Good Habits
series.tagline: Picture books about responsibility and everyday routines.

books.title: Benny, the Champion of Cleaning Up Toys
books.subtitle: Responsibility, cleaning up, and good habits

series.title: Seasonal & Collections
series.tagline: Cozy holiday reads and bundled libraries.

books.title: Poppy's Christmas Dream Calendar
books.subtitle: 25 nights of cozy Christmas bedtime stories

books.title: Emma's Big Feelings Library
books.subtitle: A collection of stories about naming and navigating emotions
